project_type: Static HTML/CSS/JS website for insurance products (Project Cuan 3.0)
test_framework: None - manual verification by opening HTML files
test_command: N/A - validate by opening in browser
verification_instructions: 1. Verify msp.html exists in /pages/ directory. 2. Check HTML is well-formed. 3. Verify calculator logic computes correctly per lookup data.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML files
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs. All code is vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing page patterns: use /assets/style.css, load header/footer via main.js component loader, use page-specific <style> blocks, use .kw class for keyword highlighting.
key_patterns: 1. Pages load header.html and footer.html via main.js component loader (div#site-header, div#site-footer). 2. Dark mode support via html.dark class. 3. CSS variables defined in style.css. 4. Keyword highlighting uses .kw (jade), .kw-cta (tangerine), .kw-gold classes. 5. Pages use page-specific custom CSS variables and styles in <style> block. 6. FAQ accordion uses .faq-item/.faq-trigger/.faq-body pattern handled by main.js. 7. Calculator logic is inline JavaScript. 8. Breadcrumb navigation at top of page-hero section.
directory_structure: Root: index.html, /pages/ (product pages), /assets/ (style.css, main.js), /components/ (header.html, footer.html), /Sample/ (older standalone pages), /Source/ (PDF source materials)
